subject: Fix broken input property names.
commit_message:
Fix broken input property names.

Change-Id: I6450145aced8d5e8d40a65ee32246e313e1d5160
Issue-ID: OOM-1010
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

The keys must match with what's used in blueprints.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Not sure if this patch causes the bootstrap job to error out. Or this is an indication of another issue being worked independantly.
If it is not related and is just an incremental fix, let me know and I will remove my -1.

Patch Set 1:

This fix is absolutely essential.  When Borislav modified the charts before they were merged, he made a breaking change to the input files that I did not notice when I did the review.
I do not know what is causing the problem you are seeing--the log output is from a rerunning of the bootstrap job, and the error is related to the fact that the job had been run before.   My original charts had configured the job for zero retries; Borislav said it did not work in his environment and commented out that configuration.

Patch Set 1:

Mike, this submission is not related to the errors you saw.  I think the error messages you quoted are due to the re-spin of the bootstrap container.  Its first life already added the plugins.  Then the reincarnations also try to upload again to the same Cloudify Manger.  Hence those "already exits" messages.   The root cause is the fist bootstrap failure, which could be due to what this submission fixes because in our experiments the old values would cause problems.
Change has been successfully merged by Mike Elliott
